name: Whiskey Sauce for Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Gradually add powdered sugar, stirring continuously.
3. Add eggs one at a time, whisking until the mixture is smooth and well combined.
4. Bring the sauce to a gentle boil.
5. Turn off the heat.
6. Carefully pour in whiskey to taste, ensuring it doesn't reach the bottom of the pan where it might sizzle.
